about.title: About
about.description: AI Nav is a curated AI tool navigator, helping everyone quickly discover truly useful AI products.
about.heading: About AI Nav
about.whyP1: AI tools are emerging at an astonishing pace, with new products launching every day. But for ordinary users, discovering truly useful and trustworthy tools amidst the flood of information is becoming increasingly difficult.
about.whyP2: AI Nav's mission is simple: apply a layer of curation, organizing high-quality AI tools in one place, so you don't have to search for a needle in an information haystack.
about.howP1: We don't pursue quantity; we focus on quality and practicality. Every tool listed has been personally tested to ensure it genuinely solves problems, rather than being a fleeting marketing gimmick.
about.howP2: The current categories cover AI Chat, Image, Video, Writing, Programming, Music, Search, Agent, Translation, Office, Design, Productivity, PPT, and more. We'll continue expanding as the AI field evolves.
about.contactP1: If you have a great AI tool to recommend or find any inaccurate information, feel free to submit an issue on GitHub or contact us directly. Your feedback directly helps us improve.
